zh.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin是Mearrdha mac Suibne和wife Mearrdha mac Suibne的兒子，於大約1040年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林。他和Hvarflad至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1083年在英國蘇格蘭賀布利德斯享年44歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭賀布利德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin是Mearrdha mac Suibne和wife Mearrdha mac Suibne的儿子，于大约1040年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林。他和Hvarflad至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1083年在英国苏格兰賀布利德斯享年44岁，埋葬在苏格兰賀布利德斯。

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English king ‘king’ (Old English cyning, cyng), perhaps acquired by someone with kingly qualities or as a pageant name by someone who had acted the part of a king or had been chosen as the master of ceremonies or ‘king’ of an event such as a tournament, festival or folk ritual. In North America, the surname King has absorbed several European cognates and equivalents with the same meaning, for example German König (see Koenig ) and Küng, French Roy , Slovenian, Croatian, or Serbian Kralj , Polish Krol . It is also very common among African Americans. It is also found as an artificial Jewish surname.
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name King, originally an Old English nickname from the vocabulary word cyning, cyng ‘king’.
Irish: adopted for a variety of names containing the syllable rí (which means ‘king’ in Irish).

variants.name: Kingdon
meanings: English (southwestern, especially Devon): habitational name from Higher Kingdon in Alverdiscott, or from Kendon in North Bovey, both in Devon. Both are named in Old English from cyning ‘king’ (see King ) or cyne- ‘royal’ + dūn ‘hill’.

variants.name: Chief
meanings: Native American: translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Cheyenne veho, meaning ‘chief’. See also King 4.

variants.name: Koenig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Dieter, Frieda, Monika, Reinhard, Egon, Fritz, Heinz, Wilhelm.

German (mainly König) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also König): from Middle High German künic, German König ‘king’, hence a German nickname for a servant or retainer of a king (for example, a farmer on a royal demesne), or alternatively a status name for the head of a craftmen's guild, or a society of sharpshooters or minstrels. As a Jewish surname, it is artificial, one of several such Ashkenazic names based on European titles of nobility or royalty. The surname Koenig is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland. In eastern Germany the surname König is in part a Germanized form (translation into German) of Sorbian Kral ‘king’. Similarly, in Czechia, Poland, Slovenia, and Croatia, it was often applied as a translation into German of Czech, Polish, Slovenian, and Croatian cognates Král (see Kral ), Król (see Krol ), and Kralj , respectively. Compare Konig .

variants.name: Kings
meanings: English (Worcestershire): variant of King , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 434, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Dublin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): apparently a habitational name referring to Dublin, the capital of Ireland, but if so it would have been adopted outside Ireland, since placenames were not normally used as surnames in Ireland.

variants.name: Doublin
meanings: English: variant of Dublin . The surname Doublin is no longer found in Britain.
History: In North America, the surname Doublin can be traced back to James Doublin/Dublin born in NC in 1780.

nameMeanings.name: Solomh
meanings: Gaelic: The Gaelic form of Solomon.

en.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin was born about 1040, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland as the son of Mearrdha mac Suibne and wife Mearrdha mac Suibne. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Hvarflad. He died in 1083, in Hebrides, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Hebrides, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin est né environ 1040, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande, fils de Mearrdha mac Suibne et wife Mearrdha mac Suibne. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Hvarflad. Il est décédé en 1083, à Hebrides, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Hebrides, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin wurde um 1040 in Diocese of Dublin, Irland, als Sohn von Mearrdha mac Suibne und wife Mearrdha mac Suibne geboren. Er hatte mit Hvarflad mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1083 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Hebrides, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Hebrides, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin è nato il circa 1040 nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda come figlio di Mearrdha mac Suibne e wife Mearrdha mac Suibne. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Hvarflad. Morì nel 1083, nel Hebrides, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Hebrides, Scotland.

ja.County Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ダブリン
ja.Islay, Hebrides, Scotland: スコットランドヘブリズ
ja.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublinは約1040年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンでMearrdha mac Suibneとwife Mearrdha mac Suibneの息子として生まれた。彼はHvarfladとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1083年にイギリススコットランドヘブリズで44歳で死去し，スコットランドヘブリズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin(은)는 대략 1040년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 Mearrdha mac Suibne(와)과 wife Mearrdha mac Suibne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Hvarflad(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1083년 영국 스코틀랜드 브라이데스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 브라이데스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda filho de Mearrdha mac Suibne e wife Mearrdha mac Suibne. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Hvarflad. Ele faleceu em 1083, em Hebrides, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Hebrides, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin родился около 1040 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия. Его родителей звали Mearrdha mac Suibne и wife Mearrdha mac Suibne. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Hvarflad. Он умер в 1083 г. в местности хебридесь, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности хебридесь, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Solomh MacMeargaigh, King of Dublin nació aproximadamente 1040, en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda como hijo de Mearrdha mac Suibne y wife Mearrdha mac Suibne. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Hvarflad. Murió en 1083, en Hebrides, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Hebrides, Scotland.
